chain.thought: Explanation: In 2008, her throws were 71.00 m and 71.40 m (best 71.40 m). In 2009, her throws were 72.85 m, 74.79 m, and 70.45 m (best 74.79 m). Since 74.79 m is greater than 71.40 m, she threw more meters in 2009.

judge_thought: Explanation: The notes show the throws for each event. In 2008, her throws were 71.00 m (Olympic Games) and 71.40 m (World Athletics Final), with a best of 71.40 m. In 2009, her throws were 72.85 m (World Student Games), 74.79 m (World Championships), and 70.45 m (World Athletics Final), with a best of 74.79 m. Since 74.79 m (2009) is greater than 71.40 m (2008), she threw more meters in 2009.
